temperate.label: Temperate
temperate.description: Four-season beds with compost-rich soil, moderate moisture, and flexible light.
temperate.mulch: 2 to 3 inches of mulch helps stabilize the root zone
warnings: water deeply instead of lightly every day

mediterranean.label: Mediterranean
mediterranean.description: Hot, dry summers and mild winters with excellent drainage and light feeding.
mediterranean.soil: sandy or gravelly, sharply drained soil
mediterranean.fertilizer: light compost or a low-nitrogen feed
mediterranean.mulch: gravel mulch or thin organic mulch
warnings: feed lightly to prevent lush weak growth

arid.label: Arid
arid.description: Desert and drought-prone beds that reward restraint, drainage, and careful watering.
arid.fertilizer: very light feeding or compost only once a season
warnings: never keep roots wet for long

coastal.label: Coastal
coastal.description: Windy, salty, changeable gardens near the ocean or large lakes.
coastal.soil: sandy loam enriched with organic matter
warnings: protect from salt spray if the plant is tender

woodland.label: Woodland
woodland.description: Dappled shade, humus-rich soil, and steadier moisture under trees.
woodland.fertilizer: leaf mold, compost, or a light organic feed

tropical.label: Tropical
tropical.description: Warm, humid spaces with rich soil, filtered light, and steady growth.
warnings: watch for fungal pressure in still air
feed in the growing season only

alpine.label: Alpine
alpine.description: Cool, windy, high-drainage conditions with lean soil and quick root drying.

prairie.label: Prairie
prairie.description: Open sunny beds with deeper soils, seasonal swings, and strong pollinator value.
prairie.fertilizer: spring compost or balanced slow-release fertilizer
warnings: allow roots to establish before drought stress

containers.label: Containers
containers.description: Pot culture for patios, porches, balconies, and compact spaces.
containers.fertilizer: regular dilute feeding during active growth
warnings: check pots daily in hot weather
